translation.literal_translation: And because of the qualifying marks. (12)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.2.12: specific qualifiers in the passage confirm the intended pair as jiva and Supreme Self.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra signal that viśeṣaṇa evidence is decisive.
